summary: Comprehensive testing of Enhanced Invoice Management System. All 47 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing completed successfully for all new features including Income Module, Bank Accounts, Opening Balance, Item-level Discounts, Soft Delete, and Professional PDF Layout. The 'Made with Emergent' badge is still visible (comes from Emergent script in index.html, not removable by app code).

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge still visible in bottom-right corner - this comes from Emergent platform script in index.html and cannot be removed by app code

backend_new_features: DELETE /api/bank-accounts/{id} - Delete bank account without transactions
Opening balance reflects in ledger calculation
Partial payment updates invoice payment status
POST /api/invoices - Create invoice with item-level percentage discount
POST /api/invoices - Create invoice with item-level fixed amount discount
POST /api/invoices - Create invoice with invoice-level discount
GET /api/dashboard/stats - Dashboard includes new stats (openingBalance, totalIncome, totalOutstanding)
GET /api/ledger - Ledger calculation (Opening + Income - Expenses = Closing)
frontend: Admin login page loads and works
Dashboard displays new stats (Opening Balance, Income Received, Total Expenses, Net Balance, Outstanding)
Income tab visible in navigation
Income page shows Total Income Received, Payment Entries, Pending Invoices
Income table displays payments with Date, Invoice, Customer, Mode, Bank, Amount, Actions
Record Payment button available
Settings page has Opening Balance section with save functionality
Settings page has Bank Accounts section with Add button
Bank accounts list displays with edit/delete actions
Ledger page shows Opening Balance + Income - Expenses = Closing Balance calculation
Ledger page has Overview, Income, Expenses, Outstanding tabs
Invoices page has 'Show deleted' checkbox
Invoice table shows Amount, Paid, Balance, Payment status, Status columns
View Invoice page has professional TAX INVOICE layout
Invoice shows Company's Bank Details section
Invoice shows Authorised Signatory section
Invoice shows Amount in words
Invoice shows Tax breakup table (Central Tax, State Tax)
Download PDF button available
Create Invoice page has Item Discount column
Create Invoice page has Invoice Discount section
Invoice Summary shows Subtotal, Item Discounts, Invoice Discount, Taxable Amount, GST, Grand Total

action_items: NOTE: 'Made with Emergent' badge cannot be removed - it's injected by Emergent platform script (emergent-main.js) in index.html. This is expected behavior for Emergent-hosted apps.
critical_code_review_comments: All new API endpoints properly implemented with authentication
Soft delete for invoices includes audit trail
Income module correctly updates invoice payment status
Ledger calculation formula correctly implemented: Opening + Income - Expenses = Closing
Item-level and invoice-level discounts properly calculated
Professional PDF invoice layout matches requirements
updated_files: /app/tests/test_gst_api.py - Updated dashboard and ledger test assertions to match new API structure
/app/tests/test_enhanced_features.py - Created new test file for enhanced features (20 tests)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for bank accounts, customers, invoices, and income entries during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All enhanced features are working correctly. New features tested: Income Module (payment tracking), Bank Accounts (multiple accounts support), Opening Balance (ledger settings), Item-level and Invoice-level Discounts, Soft Delete with Restore for invoices, Professional PDF invoice layout. The 'Made with Emergent' badge is from Emergent platform and cannot be removed. Test data with TEST_ prefix exists in the database.
